title: Algerian Lentil Tagine
description: A hearty and flavorful North African stew made with lentils, aromatic spices, and fresh minty notes. Serve with crusty bread or over couscous.
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add algerian spice blend and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add lentils and water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Stir in chopped mint and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional mint if desired.
